label: purpose
purpose: Enable specs-less repo operation input generation from raw ADR after promotion into accepted JSONL plus projection digest.

label: meta^1 purpose
purpose: Preserve ADR / issue / spec / projection / feat authority boundaries during and after specs retirement.

label: meta^2 purpose
purpose: Make feat inputs deterministic, reproducible, and reviewable without active specs-main.

label: meta^3 purpose
purpose: Prevent semantic regression in definition, output/env, dependency, uniqueness, and destructive-case coverage.

label: meta^4 purpose
purpose: Reduce repeated coordination and context-transfer costs across proposal threads and local canonical gates.

label: meta^5 purpose
purpose: Improve worker reliability and reviewer confidence by making repo operation input machine-generated and bounded.

label: meta^6 purpose
purpose: Increase throughput of correct accepted changes while preserving negative-case and false-pass controls.

label: meta^7 purpose
purpose: Raise delivery predictability for products, internal tools, and governance migrations.

label: meta^8 purpose
purpose: Protect user trust and operational continuity by making rollback, evidence, and authority boundaries explicit.

label: meta^9 purpose
purpose: Sustain compounding governance capability through reusable JSONL/projection/guard protocols.
